# Version 3.0.0
> **New minor release** · [NuGet (prerelease)](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/3.0.0-preview)
> **Superseded by [3.116.0](3.116.0.md)** · Never released as stable — these changes rolled up into 3.116.0.
> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](3.0.0/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 3.0.0 ships 65 product-facing changes across bug fixes and platform work.

## Breaking Changes

- **Public API surface changed** — The linked API-diff report for 3.0.0 lists the removed and modified members. Review it before upgrading and update any call sites flagged there.

## Engine

- **SKGLElement to SkiaSharp.Views.WPF** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@gmurray81](https://github.com/gmurray81) ([#2317](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2317))

## Preview 5 (October 24, 2024)

Preview 5 carried Revert SKBitmap.Encode with SKPngEncoderOptions to previous behavior (2.88.8); the new GLControl packages for WinForms; Function pointers and LibraryImport; SDK, workloads and projects; compatibility overloads for SKFilterQuality; sure ANGLE reaches the nugets; memory leaks in MAUI views; .NET to 8.0; Build ANGLE separately; Provide Span overload for SetRectRadii;….

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.0.0-preview.4.1...v3.0.0-preview.5.4)

## Preview 4 (July 18, 2024)

Preview 4 carried AVE disposing cloned SKPaint; Do not stretch the background; the SKPaint.FilterQuality for the SamplingOptions in obsolete methods; SKXamlCanvas on Uno Skia to use Bgra8888; R-Tree overload of beginRecording; Re-generate APIs; the GetKerningPairAdjustments API; more SKPicture APIs; skia external; spans to the color filters; XamlRoot may be null when the SKXamlCanvas is….

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.0.0-preview.3.1...v3.0.0-preview.4.1)

## Preview 3 (April 9, 2024)

Preview 3 carried Bring Metal APIs to a common .NET TFM; and remove the compatibility APIs; Expose Blazor components dpi; Snapshot returning magenta color Apple Metal; Clean up SKTextBlobBuilder and SKRunBuffer APIs; SKGLElement to SkiaSharp.Views.WPF; Unsafe.As for better perf; benchmarks project; a build using MSVC; comment.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.0.0-preview.2.1...v3.0.0-preview.3.1)

## Preview 2 (February 20, 2024)

Preview 2 carried Bind Skottie's Animation Builder; the Vulcanized compiler options; Metal as a backend on Mac Catalyst; SKImage.ToRawShader; Do not provide invalid externs; Run APIScan after packaging on the packages; Don't put metadata in package versions; Correctly package managed runtime-only files.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.0.0-preview.1.8...v3.0.0-preview.2.1)

## Preview 1 (February 6, 2024)

Preview 1 carried Reduce checkout size of submodules; Implemented SKGLView; support for WinUI accelerated views; PlatformConfiguration properties trimmable; Avoid async void in SKXamlCanvas; NuGet versions need to be < 64 characters; harfbuzz to 8.3.0; SkResources is skia_component not static_library; Revert the libjpeg-turbo update and roll back to 2.1.5.1; webp to 1.3.2; Restore nosimd….

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v2.88.9...v3.0.0-preview.1.8)
